verses.3: She has sent out her maidens.
verses.4: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here!”
verses.6: Leave your simple ways, and live.
verses.7: One who corrects a mocker invites insult.
verses.8: Don’t reprove a scoffer, lest he hate you.
verses.9: Instruct a wise person, and he will be still wiser.
verses.10: The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom.
verses.11: For by me your days will be multiplied.
verses.12: If you are wise, you are wise for yourself.
verses.14: She sits at the door of her house,
verses.15: to call to those who pass by,
verses.16: “Whoever is simple, let him turn in here.”
verses.18: But he doesn’t know that the departed spirits are there,
